---
title: "Quantum rates in dissipative systems with spatially varying friction"
author: ["Oliver Bridge", "Paolo Lazzaroni","Rocco Martinazzo", "Mariana Rossi", "Stuart C. Althorpe","Yair Litman"]
date: 2024-05-28
publication: "J. Chem. Phys. (accepted)"
categories: ["quantum_dynamics"]
url_source: https://doi.org/10.1063/5.0216823
url_preprint: 
journ: "J. Chem. Phys."
issue: "161"
page: "024110"
year: 2024
image: featured.png
pub_number: 27
---
